tape: Equities firm midday -- cool June PPI (-0.3% headline, core +0.2%) + ASML's +30% AI-capex/capacity guide keep the chip/AI trade bid, VIX ~16.2 (-2%), S&P/Nasdaq higher; the live tail is energy/geopolitics -- WTI back to ~$79.85 (+0.6%), Brent ~$85.22 on renewed overnight US-Iran strikes + the reinstated Hormuz naval blockade, so research's risk_off oil leg is re-validated while quant_regime still reads calm_drift on equities.

alerts.headline: Risk-on equity tape (cool June PPI + ASML AI-capex, VIX 16.2 -2%) BUT oil is the live tail -- WTI ~$79.85/Brent ~$85.22 on fresh US-Iran strikes + reinstated Hormuz blockade. Regime split: equities calm_drift, energy/geopolitics the tail; research's oil-risk leg is back on after the ceasefire collapse.

HELD -- FRESH 7/15 PR: unveiled Wraptor MX multi-shot non-lethal prototype (extends WrapShield alongside DFR-X drone + BolaWrap); product/marketing news, NOT a contract or revenue -- incremental, no boost. OPERATIONAL: risk.json flags price cache badly desynced (cache 1.555 last 7/8 vs broker/alpaca 2.19, 38.9%) and stop line $2.03 sits ABOVE the stale cache -- a stop-check on that cache could phantom-sell a +$3.11 winner. Do-not-ADD ($200M baby-shelf capacity). Human/reconciler must confirm live feed drives stops.

CANDIDATE (6.17, below 6.25 line): no NEW July offering -- but ~30% dilution stands ($50M registered direct 27.6M sh @ $1.81 + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26, 7/6 F-3 registers 3.03M PIPE sh for resale). Stock ~$1.70 BELOW the $1.81 offer; CEO 7/7 buy came AFTER the raise. Concur risk.json -- do not buy as insider breakout.
CANDIDATE (6.1, below line): textbook pump-and-dump -- HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), now ~$3.59, no fundamental driver. Reject on pump veto. Concur risk.json.

CANDIDATE (5.17, below line): the +4.0 insider score is offering-backer accumulation, NOT management conviction -- stock ~$9.35 still sits BELOW the $11.52 May $300M-offering price. Treat as dilution overhang; do not buy as fresh insider breakout.

HELD/best gainer ($14.27) -- 7/15 disclosure of ICONIQ Strategic Partners VIII buys (241,628 sh @ $12.26 on 7/10 + 64,771 on 7/13), but the transactions are 7/10-7/13 and already carried in the +13% ICONIQ/director-buy move -- already priced, no boost. Post-lockup distribution overhang persists (Form 144 1.75M sh 7/8 + Lightspeed sales). risk.json flags a 14.2% cache desync (cache 12.61 vs broker 14.49) -- stops/P&L off the cache understate the position.

HELD, no fresh company item -- energy leg gets a bid with WTI back ~$80. Insider BUYS (Bhappu $968k 7/7, Hansen 7/8) already scored, but risk.json net-NEGATIVE by size (Chalmers Form 144 ~800k sh > ~$1M of buys), Lorentzian -0.75, FinBERT 0.0. ~$13.30. No boost.

HELD, clean -- 7/15 brokerage summary shows avg 'Hold' but Goldman initiated BUY $27 PT + Evercore $25, both well above ~$17 price. Carried Caris Detect launch (7/1), director $990k buy (7/13), $100M buyback, no shelf/ATM. FinBERT +0.144. No boost.

WATCHLIST (scan 2.71): DLA bridge mod extended the refrigerant contract to 11/29/26 (options to 5/29/27) but the DLA is still RE-REVIEWING its 2025 award after a competitor bid-protest (rescinded 1/2026). Supply continues uninterrupted; mild negative nuance on the thesis, not material. No boost.
HELD, low risk -- no fresh July news; anti-dilutive $140M self-tender closed 3/20, no shelf/ATM. ~$5.43, stop $5.00. Carried, no boost.

movers.note: Energy leg bid as WTI pushes back to ~$80 on renewed US-Iran strikes + reinstated Hormuz blockade; ~$13.30, no company news.
~$2.19 after last week's ATF/WrapShield pop; fresh 7/15 Wraptor MX prototype PR is incremental. Cache desync is the live operational issue.
